[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Bijo Hammax''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Narvath (species)|Narvath]] [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] operative who fought during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Biography==
An experienced warrior, Hammax honed his skills in the [[Narvath resistance]] and in the last year of [[Rebellion era]] fighting alongside with members of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His experience and abilities earned him command of an NRI assault team assigned to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]]. During the search for the [[Teljkon Vagabond]], Hammax was responsible for penetrating and boarding the mysterious vessel, but after [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] prematurely landed on the ship, Pakkpekatt canceled Hammax's mission. He joined Pakkpekatt in volunteering to search for Lando.
